patterns: DJI vs Insta360 patent war is a major ongoing story -- watch for court updates, injunction decisions
DJI's US regulatory exclusion is a recurring theme -- check for updates each run

GoPro MISSION 1 reviews are still publishing -- look for long-term test results
GoPro going-concern + strategic review is active -- check weekly for acquirer names, sale progress
Nothing Phone 3 remains flagship for 2026 (no Phone 4), Phone 4b launching July 7

Compact camera sales surging 30% YoY (CIPA data) -- track quarterly updates

feedback: Initial run. Focus on finding strong stories across all 4 categories. Prioritize visual trends and interesting campaigns. Include production technique stories that would interest camera/imaging professionals.

First run completed June 22, 2026. 12 stories seeded across all 4 categories. Top stories: DJI Pocket 4P launch and DJI vs Insta360 patent war (both score 9). Freshest stories are within the 14-day window. Several stories included as first-run seeds despite being older (GoPro MISSION 1, DJI Avata 360, visionOS 26).

Second run completed June 23, 2026. 6 stories found across production (4) and visual_trends (2). No campaigns or creator_study stories found at sufficient quality. GoPro going-concern is top story (score 9). Next run should explicitly search creator campaign angles.

Third run completed June 25, 2026. 6 stories found across production (2), campaigns (3), and visual_trends (1). Campaigns gap from prior runs now filled with Cannes Lions 2026 coverage and Insta360 Hello Kitty collab. Top story: Xtra Muse 2 Pro / DJI Pocket 4P rebrand (score 8). Creator_study remains hard to fill -- no fresh platform-specific stories in 14-day window. Next run: check Cannes Lions final-day winners, GoPro sale progress, DJI shell company developments.

Fourth run completed July 2, 2026. 7 stories found across all 4 categories (3 production, 2 creator_study, 1 campaigns, 1 visual_trends). Top story: CazéTV 21M concurrent viewers (score 8). World Cup driving multiple story types. Creator_study gap finally filled with CazéTV record and YouTube Shorts UI change. Next run: follow up DJI enterprise drone reveal (July 8), Nothing Phone 4b launch (July 7), check GoPro sale progress, World Cup visual trend stories.
